resource.name: PalletMisMatch.Message.Message
resource.object: Pallet count does not match input value, all packs must be scanned

resource.name: Stock take could not be started, one may be active already
resource.object: Stock take could not be started, one may be active already

resource.name: Enter actual number of packs on the pallet before scanning
resource.object: Enter actual number of packs on the pallet before scanning

resource.name: Pallet count does not match input value, all packs must be scanned
resource.object: Pallet count does not match input value, all packs must be scanned

resource.name: This pack is on another pallet
resource.object: This pack is on another pallet

resource.name: PalletDelete.Message
resource.object: Are you sure you want to delete pallet and its packs

resource.name: PalletCreatedPacks.Message
resource.object: New packs were created NL on pallet CurrentPallet.number NL it now has CurrentPallet.curamount packs

resource.name: PalletPackOnAnother.Message
resource.object: Pack CurrentPack.Number is already on pallet CurrentPack.Pallet.Number

resource.name: PalletNotOnOrder.Message
resource.object: Pallet CurrentPallet.Number is not on the order . Do you want to assign it to the order
